'''âl-n-y-sh''' ('''kalanyeshoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:yutz|yutz]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-n-y-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yutz|yutz]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âl-n-y-sh
|-
! Lemma
| kalanyeshoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thilanyeshoko|thilanyeshoko]] || [[word:jilanyeshoko|jilanyeshoko]] || [[word:shilanyeshoko|shilanyeshoko]] || [[word:kilanyeshoko|kilanyeshoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthulanyeshoko|thuthulanyeshoko]] || [[word:jujulanyeshoko|jujulanyeshoko]] || [[word:shushulanyeshoko|shushulanyeshoko]] || [[word:kukulanyeshoko|kukulanyeshoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thulanyeshoko|thulanyeshoko]] || [[word:julanyeshoko|julanyeshoko]] || [[word:shulanyeshoko|shulanyeshoko]] || [[word:kulanyeshoko|kulanyeshoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thulanyeshoko|thulanyeshoko]] || [[word:julanyeshoko|julanyeshoko]] || [[word:shulanyeshoko|shulanyeshoko]] || [[word:kulanyeshoko|kulanyeshoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:tholanyeshoko|tholanyeshoko]] || [[word:jolanyeshoko|jolanyeshoko]] || [[word:sholanyeshoko|sholanyeshoko]] || [[word:kolanyeshoko|kolanyeshoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠlanyeshoko|thĂŠlanyeshoko]] || [[word:jĂŠlanyeshoko|jĂŠlanyeshoko]] || [[word:shĂŠlanyeshoko|shĂŠlanyeshoko]] || [[word:kĂŠlanyeshoko|kĂŠlanyeshoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathalanyeshoko|thathalanyeshoko]] || [[word:jajalanyeshoko|jajalanyeshoko]] || [[word:shashalanyeshoko|shashalanyeshoko]] || [[word:kakalanyeshoko|kakalanyeshoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thalanyeshoko|thalanyeshoko]] || [[word:jalanyeshoko|jalanyeshoko]] || [[word:shalanyeshoko|shalanyeshoko]] || [[word:kalanyeshoko|kalanyeshoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thalanyeshoko|thalanyeshoko]] || [[word:jalanyeshoko|jalanyeshoko]] || [[word:shalanyeshoko|shalanyeshoko]] || [[word:kalanyeshoko|kalanyeshoko]]
|}

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
